milestoneTitle: v1.0.0 — Version 0 complete. v0.7 design-system refactor shipped in full: unified .dash-tile grammar, 4-quadrant condensed layout (status top / eyebrow / title), progressive-disclosure tap-to-expand with origin-from-tile animation + dimmed backdrop, swipe-to-reveal delete for drafts, universal 'pin = send to Learn' rule, state pill as status label vs. CTA as action verb, drag lift goes brighter not darker per HIG, '? m' placeholder for unknown durations. v0 completion tag 'v0-complete' points at v0.7.1-dev.61. Docs swept — CLAUDE.md design-language section gains a new 'Tile grammar' block, status.md carries the full M9.16 → M9.19a ledger, plan doc marked complete. v1.0.0 is the new baseline; subsequent work tracked in a fresh plan doc.
